negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_048
prompt: The video opens with a close-up shot of a granite countertop in a cozy kitchen or bar setting. A clear glass pitcher with a diamond-cut pattern is prominently placed on the counter. To the left, a bottle with an orange label and a green bottle are visible, suggesting the presence of beverages. A metal stirrer lies nearby. The background features wooden cabinets, adding warmth to the scene. A hand, clad in a dark sweater and adorned with a gold ring, enters the frame and begins pouring a clear liquid from a smaller glass container into the pitcher. The liquid flows steadily until the pitcher is partially filled. The hand then moves out of the frame, leaving the pitcher with the liquid inside. The final frame captures the hand still in motion, having just completed the pour, with the pitcher now containing the liquid. The camera remains steady throughout, focusing on the action of pouring and the details of the pitcher and countertop.
